relatedPrivateRepo.role: Enterprise/Fortress private runtime and vector DB path

TypeScript SDK added ingestConnectorSourceSystemEvent helpers in step 02.

ScoutService and ContextRecomputeProcessor still own local EF writes behind application/API boundaries.

openRisks: Scout operator migration CLI wrapper is not implemented.
